name: Ribbon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cream the shortening until light and fluffy using an electric mixer.
3. Gradually add sugar to the creamed shortening while continuing to beat.
4. Stir in the beaten egg and vanilla extract; beat well until combined.
5. Blend in the flour mixture until smooth.
6. Divide the dough into three parts.
7. Add chopped cherries to one part, melted chocolate to another, and poppy seeds to the third.
8. Shape each portion of dough into a rectangle on wax paper-lined baking sheets.
9. Refrigerate at least 24 hours before proceeding.
10. Remove dough from the pan and cut lengthwise, then crosswise into 1/4-inch slices.
11. Place the cookie slices on ungreased cookie sheets.
12. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until very light brown at 400°F (200°C).
13. Makes approximately 6-7 dozen cookies.
